title: Slow Local Trains
writer: Jean Bastia, Pascal Bastia, Guy Lionel
actors: Jean Richard, Roger Pierre, Louis de Funès
plot: Émile Durand, an insecticide manufacturer, is appalled to learn that his son Gérard has fallen in love with Suzy, the daughter of a theatre company. Realising his father will never favour the union, Gérard joins the company on the...
